authored.para: This instruction compares the byte values in two registers, and conditionally branches to a label at a PC-relative offset if the condition is true. This instruction provides a hint that this is not a subroutine call or return. This instruction does not affect the condition flags.

alias_list.alias_list_intro: This instruction is used by the aliases

aliasref.hover: Compare signed less than or equal to bytes and branch
Compare unsigned lower than bytes and branch
Compare unsigned lower than or same as bytes and branch
Compare signed less than bytes and branch

alias_list_outro.text: below for details of when each alias is preferred.

a.hover: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.
Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.
Is the 32-bit name of the second general-purpose source register, encoded in the "Rm" field.
Is the program label to be conditionally branched to. Its offset from the address of this instruction, in the range -1024 to 1020, is encoded as "imm9" times 4.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_regs2.CBBGT_8_regs

explanation.enclist: CBBGT_8_regs, CBBGE_8_regs, CBBHI_8_regs, CBBHS_8_regs, CBBEQ_8_regs, CBBNE_8_regs

intro.para: Is the 32-bit name of the general-purpose register to be tested, encoded in the "Rt" field.

ps.name: A64.control.compbranch_regs2.CBBGT_8_regs
